data.title: Pepe price declines 9% as top memecoins falter
data.description:
Pepe changed hands around $0. 0000058, having dropped 9% amid sharp declines for memecoins. Dogecoin and Shiba Inu also shed gains, while Fartcoin plunged 13%. Memecoins are struggling as privacy coins explode
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/pepe-price-declines-9-as-top-memecoins-falter/

data.title: Societe Generale and Swift Complete Tokenized Bond Settlement Trial
data.description:
Societe Generale’s digital asset subsidiary SG-FORGE has completed a landmark pilot with Swift, demonstrating the settlement of tokenized bonds using both fiat and digital currencies. The trial marks a step toward integrating blockchain-based securities into existing institutional payment rails. The test focused on real-world settlement workflows rather than proof-of-concept mechanics
source: https://www.ethnews.com/societe-generale-and-swift-complete-tokenized-bond-settlement-trial/

data.title: BREAKING: Coinbase to List the Expected Altcoin for Futures Trading
data.description:

Lighter, which was launched 16 days ago, has a market capitalization of $468 million. *This is not investment advice. data.title: CME Group to launch Cardano, Stellar, and Chainlink futures
data.description:
CME Group, a leading global derivatives exchange, announced plans to launch futures contracts for Cardano (ADA), Chainlink (LINK), and Stellar (XLM) on February 9. The products are regulated by the US Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). The Chicago-based derivatives marketplace will offer both micro-sized and larger-sized contracts for each crypto asset. The new offerings will […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cme-group-to-launch-cardano-stellar-link/

data.title: Senate Delays Crypto Market Structure Vote After Industry Support Fractures
data.description:
The Senate Banking Committee has postponed its planned markup and vote on the Digital Asset Market Structure CLARITY Act after a sudden reversal in industry backing left the bill short of the votes needed to advance.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/senate-delays-crypto-market-structure-vote-after-industry-support-fractures/

data.title: Trump Criticizes EU's Fines on U.S. Tech Companies as Unfair
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump expressed his discontent on Truth Social regarding the substantial fines imposed by the European Union on American technology companies. He described these actions as discriminatory against the exceptional technology and tax practices of the United States. Data indicates that in 2024, the EU's fines on U.S. tech firms amounted to 3.8 billion euros, surpassing the total income tax paid by all publicly listed European internet technology companies, which was 3.2 billion euros during the same period. Major American tech companies such as Apple, Google, and Meta are currently facing billions of euros in fines or tax adjustments from the EU.
